description: Expansion segments (13 retrieved) confirm user has already drafted and sent a proactive TPS/CPT letter to Accenture HR (Immanuel Gladson), completed multiple steps in the I-9 process, is monitoring TPS extension news, and needs an updated work letter from Accenture. The situation was unresolved at the June 23, 2026 conversation end. Status is active_unresolved; temporal_status current_inferred because active steps are documented but resolution is not confirmed. All expansion segments are user statements or user instructions; no external pasted content used to establish status. Missing source b01c1:msi:001 may contain additional documentation but does not affect the active-status determination.

description: User instructions in expansion segments demonstrate active user-driven navigation: user requested specific letter drafts, asked for guidance on next steps, and followed up across two conversation sessions (June 17 and June 23). This supports implicit_continuation endorsement — the user returned to continue the same work activity. No explicit project endorsement statement, but continued engagement with a consistent objective supports the recurring_responsibility classification.

description: User states they submitted a Blade Runner reflection paper for Unit 8 on March 4, 2026. On March 16 the professor notified the user that the paper was flagged 87% AI-generated by Turnitin, grade was set to 0, and a rewrite was allowed. User requests help with the rewrite. These direct statements establish: candidate_type assignment; knowledge_layer work_entity; user is sole author (user_owned, student role); the organizational context is a film studies/genre course.
provenance_notes: Segments from the initial bundle (first 20 segments). Direct user statements. The professor's notification may have been pasted from email — treated as external pasted content establishing the AI-detection result, not as a direct user-authored fact about the paper's quality. User's own description of the assignment and rewrite request are direct user statements.

description: Conversation continues with rewrite drafting. No rewrite completion is confirmed in the retrieved segments (first 20 + last 50 of 164 eligible). Status: rewrite_required_after_ai_detection_incident. Temporal_status: historical_status_unknown — the conversation is from March 2026 and Batch 01 selection skews to early conversations; the rewrite may have been completed outside this conversation. Status_current_confidence low: no completion evidence in either bundle or expansion segments.
provenance_notes: hr-021 applied: do not infer completion from recency. 94 middle segments were not retrieved; they likely contain draft iterations but the established pattern (rewrite requested, not yet submitted) is consistent across first 20 and last 50 segments. Missing source b01c1:msi:002 may contain assignment rubrics or submitted rewrite but cannot be inspected.

The film assignment is clearly distinct from the Blade Runner paper (CAND-B01C1-002) in content domain, date, and deliverable type. hr-003 applied: separate activities in one conversation are not merged.

description: Remaining expansion segments (March 26-30 session) show continued work on film production decisions. No explicit submission confirmation appears in the retrieved segments. description: User directly states they are preparing application materials for the OpenAI Safety Fellowship (April 29, 2026). User confirms: GitHub handle Yohanes-Mk, public portfolio repositories (AI Aggregator, NearbyTalk, Fleet Command), portfolio site https://yohanes-os.vercel.app/. These direct statements establish: candidate_type job_application (specific named fellowship with active application preparation); user_owned (sole applicant); active/in_progress status at conversation time. The Astra Fellowship is mentioned as a fallback alternative by the user.
provenance_notes: Derived from the 30 expansion segments (full-evidence expansion). These are direct user statements and user instructions. The portfolio site URL is a direct user statement and has been preserved as stated without modification. Do not treat the portfolio site as assistant-generated content.
